reviews.comment:
Nos gustaría remarcar el excelente estado de limpieza y conservación de la estación de servicio, especialmente de los sanitarios.

También agradecer la amabilidad y profesionalidad del personal, muy simpáticos todos.

(Translated by Google)
We would like to highlight the excellent cleanliness and maintenance of the service station, especially the restrooms.

We would also like to thank the staff for their friendliness and professionalism; they were all very friendly.

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias Andrea! Te esperamos de nuevo pronto

reviews.comment:
La verdad es que estoy super disgustada con el trato y atención de una de las cajeras, se acerca de manera muy prepotente hacia mi amiga y a mi intentando practicamente corrernos del lugar, y nos empieza a gritar si habíamos consumido, cuando 10 minutos antes había pasado por caja a comprar!! Nisiquiera pidio disculpas. He ido muchas veces y nunca había tenido una situación como esta, claramente necesitan poner énfasis sobre las personas que contratan.

(Translated by Google)
The truth is, I'm incredibly upset with the way one of the cashiers treated me and me. She approached my friend and me in a very arrogant manner, practically trying to chase us out of the store. She started yelling at us about whether we had bought anything, even though she had just stopped by the register to buy something 10 minutes earlier! She didn't even apologize. I've been there many times and have never had a situation like this before. They clearly need to put more emphasis on the people they hire.

reviewReply.comment: Estimada, lamentamos lo sucedido y tomamos nota de su comentario. Adoptaremos medidas para que no vuelva a suceder.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNuNFpIYmFREAE

reviews.comment:
En el resto del ACA se sirven platos de calidad 👏👏👏 la trucha una exquisitez,  el ciervo a la cazadora, las empanadas todo lo que pidas  es muy bueno y los precios son muy accesibles,

(Translated by Google)
The rest of the ACA serves quality dishes 👏👏👏 the trout is exquisite, the venison hunter's style, the empanadas, everything you order is very good and the prices are very affordable.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNueHZmLUJnEAE
